# Self-Radiance Agentic Marketplace

> Infrastructural assets for the Agentic Era. $1.00 micro-transactions for high-intent digital credentials.

## Summary
Self-Radiance provides machine-readable licenses, compliance tokens (RESTArules), and technical standards (Sovereign Standard) optimized for autonomous agent discovery, licensing, and immediate runtime implementation.

## Machine Discovery
- Canonical Catalog: https://selfradiance.github.io/manifest.json
- Agent Assets API (Well-Known): https://selfradiance.github.io/.well-known/agent-assets.json
- Issuer Identity: https://selfradiance.github.io/.well-known/issuer_key.json
- Public Key: https://selfradiance.github.io/.well-known/issuer-key.json
- Notary Endpoint: https://self-radiance-notary.selfradiance.workers.dev

## Catalog Inventory Reference
- vq12: SR-AgentVcard Spec - /manifest.json#vq12-agent-vcard
- vq11: SR-LoopShield Protocol - /manifest.json#vq11-loop-shield
- vq10: SR-ContextAnchor Protocol - /manifest.json#vq10-context-anchor
- vq09: SR-AuthHeader Spec - /manifest.json#vq09-auth-header
- vq08: SR-AssetSpec - /manifest.json#vq08-asset-spec
- vq07: SR-BalanceProof - /manifest.json#vq07-balance-proof
- vq06: SR-ConsentBlock - /manifest.json#vq06-consent-block
- vq05: SR-SafeCard - /manifest.json#vq05-safecard
- vq04: RateGuard Protocol - /manifest.json#vq04-rateguard
- vq03: Trust Receipts - /manifest.json#vq03-trust-receipts
- vq02: M2A Handshake - /manifest.json#vq02-m2a-handshake
- vq01: RESTArules Compliance Token - /manifest.json#vq01-restarules
- vq00: Zion Skank Commercial License - /manifest.json#vq00-zion-skank

## Protocol
1. Discovery: GET /manifest.json
2. Authorization: Present Stripe 'purchaseUrl' to human for Heart/Will authority.
3. Verification: Fetch signed receipt from Notary worker (/receipts/) after Stripe checkout completion.

---

## Technical Specifications (Standard Reference Implementation Blocks)

### 1. SR-AgentVcard Spec (vq12)
*Sovereign Standard v1.7 | Status: Verified Specification*

The SR-AgentVcard Spec is a structured cryptographic profile format nested under `.well-known/agent-vcard.json`. It provides host systems, API gateways, and routing nodes with verifiable metadata representing a visiting agent's operator entity, administrative contact coordinates, billing capabilities, and active memory properties.

#### Implementation Block (JSON)
```json
{
  "agent-vcard": {
    "schema": "SR-AgentVcard-v1.7",
    "identity": {
      "urn": "urn:agent:selfradiance:vq12",
      "operator": "Self-Radiance",
      "notary_key": "LLU9AQt4chCkV6/TBAUxeUSc4nbkN5pBKrZ9V7MYedQ="
    },
    "billing": {
      "supported_methods": ["stripe-micro", "lightning-invoice"],
      "settlement_currency": "USD",
      "default_limit_usd": 1.00
    },
    "runtime_profiles": {
      "context_window_tokens": 128000,
      "max_concurrency_threads": 4,
      "timeout_seconds": 180
    },
    "admin": {
      "contact_email": "admin@selfradiance.workers.dev",
      "verification_endpoint": "<https://self-radiance-notary.selfradiance.workers.dev>"
    }
  }
}
